title: Yumecraft
description: A mod that adds liminal dimensions to your minecraft world. Inspired by Yume Nikki & 2kki.
body:
This Mod adds 3 liminal dimensions to your world. These dimensions are accessed via sleeping. Once you start sleeping you have a random chance of teleporting to either of these dimensions. If you die in these worlds you are intended to be teleported back to your spawn and keep your items.

 

  This mod is an exploration mod only. Nothing else.

 

This Mod is inspired by Yume 2kki and uses some sounds from the game. If anyone from the 2kki team has any problems contact me using the following email and I'll remove said sounds: rebbystuff@gmail.com

**WARNING: Versions 0.3.x & 0.4.0 are incompatible. You need to start a new world for the update.**

**WARNING_2: I'm a beginner programmer and there might be bugs I might not know about. I recommend creating a back-up of your world after each play session.**

_Credits:_

Sounds:

Yume Nikki:
sounds/music/mus002 - Kikiyama, "BGM_007"

Yume 2kki:
sounds/music/mus000 - 音師竹内, "ループ「青光」"

sounds/music/mus001 - LSD, "sound2a_"

sounds/step/step_000 - "575-ashioto-1&2"
